objective:
Implement V2.188 Evidence-Bound Autonomous Development for Alchemy Dev Agent only.

Scope is strictly D:\AI\Alchemy Dev Agent System\alchemy-dev-agent. Do not open, modify, run, or resume Billing Core or any other business repository. Do not use Billing Core as a writable target; it may appear only as historical context in existing Alchemy documents.

Create a detailed V2.188 design document based on the latest audit and implement it with tests. V2.188 must close these verified V2.187 gaps: (1) worker-reported changed_files, exit_code, tests_passed, and final PASS markers can be fabricated; derive phase changes from independent before/after repository snapshots or VCS diff and execute/validate required commands independently; (2) expired waivers are accepted and requirement-level waivers over-bypass obligations; enforce obligation-scoped, time-valid, authority-bound waivers; (3) delivery ledgers omit branch and commit identity; capture and validate coherent Git/worktree identity; (4) direct full-roadmap and unified document-driven entrypoints can still default to legacy/unlocked mode; make goal-locked mode fail-safe by default with explicit legacy opt-out; (5) semantic inventory skips large files and delivered/generated surfaces and is too backend-specific; scan in chunks and add configurable stack-neutral schema/build/delivery surface coverage; (6) add adversarial regression tests proving fake worker evidence cannot reach 100 percent.

Preserve existing Alchemy changes and unrelated dirty state. Do not force-reset or rewrite history. Completion requires fresh targeted tests, full unittest discovery, static/schema audit, and a real read-only Codex smoke where applicable. Do not claim 100 percent if any V2.188 proof is unproven.
